title: postapiauthloginwithvalidstaffcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with valid staff credentials returns 200 status and a valid JWT token.

title: postapiauthstudentloginwithvalidstudentcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/student/login with valid student credentials returns 200 status and a valid JWT token.

title: postapiauthchangepasswordwithvalidcurrentandnewpassword
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/change-password with valid currentPassword and newPassword and valid authorization token returns 200 confirmation of password change.

title: postapiauthforgotpasswordwithregisteredemail
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/forgot-password with a registered email returns 200 confirmation that reset token/email was sent.

title: getapiauthmewithauthorizationtoken
description: Verify that GET /api/auth/me with a valid Authorization Bearer token returns 200 with the current authenticated user's profile.

title: getapistudentswithadmintokenreturnsstudentlist
description: Verify that GET /api/students with Authorization Bearer admin token returns 200 with a paginated list of students.

title: getapiclearancerequestswithauthorizedtokenreturnsrequests
description: Verify that GET /api/clearance/requests with valid admin or department staff token returns 200 with a list of clearance requests filtered by role or department.
